activities.title: Friday Opening Ceremony & Chef Welcome
activities.description: Kick off the festival with host chefs, live music, and a quick overview of weekend highlights on the Main Stage.

activities.title: Food Truck Parade
activities.description: Watch a parade of the festival’s top food trucks with samples, chef commentary, and music.

activities.title: Kids' Pizza Playzone
activities.description: Hands-on play area where kids can stretch dough and add pretend toppings with staff supervision.

activities.title: Kids' Build-Your-Own Taco Bar
activities.description: A supervised station where kids can assemble their own soft tacos with mild fillings and colorful toppings.

activities.title: Storytime & Snacks
activities.description: Short food-themed stories read aloud with juice and fruit snacks for little ones.

activities.title: Family Salsa Dance Party
activities.description: An upbeat salsa dance session with easy steps for all ages, led by a live instructor and DJ.

activities.title: Junior Taste Trail
activities.description: Guided walk to three kid-friendly vendors where children can collect stamps and small bites.

activities.title: Chili Cook-Off Showcase
activities.description: Watch finalists plate and present their chili entries on stage with live commentary.

activities.title: Saturday Night Fireworks & Music
activities.description: End Saturday with a fireworks show synchronized to a chef-curated playlist.

activities.title: Sunday Brunch Jazz Garden
activities.description: Relax with live jazz while enjoying brunch dishes from select vendors.

activities.title: BBQ Pitmaster Tour
activities.description: Guided behind-the-scenes walk through the barbecue pit area with safety gear provided.

activities.title: Vegan Market Walk
activities.description: Host-led stroll through vegan and plant-based vendors with tasting recommendations.

activities.title: Festival Closing Ceremony
activities.description: Awards, thank-yous, and a final toast to close the festival.

promo_codes.description: 10% off eligible festival tickets for a limited time.
$5 off tasting token bundles when you spend $30 or more.
15% off large festival purchases including tickets and tokens.
$25 off VIP ticket types during the early bird window.

ticket_delivery_methods.name: Mobile Pass (Email/Wallet)
ticket_delivery_methods.description: Receive a scannable mobile pass via email that can be added to your phone wallet.

ticket_delivery_methods.name: Print-at-Home Ticket
ticket_delivery_methods.description: Download and print PDF tickets immediately after purchase.

ticket_delivery_methods.name: Standard Mail Delivery
ticket_delivery_methods.description: Physical tickets mailed to your address within 7–10 business days.

ticket_delivery_methods.name: Will Call Pickup
ticket_delivery_methods.description: Pick up printed tickets at the Will Call counter on the day of your visit.

ticket_delivery_methods.name: Box Office Pickup
ticket_delivery_methods.description: Collect your tickets at the main box office before entering the festival grounds.

ticket_types.name: Friday General Admission - Early Bird
ticket_types.description: Discounted Friday general admission with entry after 11:00 AM.

ticket_types.name: Friday General Admission
ticket_types.description: Standard Friday general admission with full-day access.

ticket_types.name: Friday VIP Experience
ticket_types.description: Includes VIP lounge, priority entry, and two complimentary drinks on Friday.

ticket_types.name: Friday Child Ticket (Ages 6–12)
ticket_types.description: Discounted admission for children ages 6–12 on Friday.

ticket_types.name: Weekend Pass (Fri–Sun)
ticket_types.description: General admission access for all three festival days.

ticket_types.name: Two-Day Pass (Fri & Sat)
ticket_types.description: General admission for both Friday and Saturday.

ticket_types.name: Saturday General Admission - Morning Entry
ticket_types.description: Saturday general admission with entry between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM.

ticket_types.name: Saturday General Admission
ticket_types.description: Full-day Saturday general admission with access to all public areas.

ticket_types.name: Saturday General Admission - Evening Only
ticket_types.description: Discounted Saturday admission valid after 5:00 PM only.

ticket_types.name: Saturday VIP Experience
ticket_types.description: Includes VIP lounge access, chef meet-and-greet, and reserved seating at main stage.

ticket_types.name: Saturday Child Ticket (Ages 6–12)
ticket_types.description: Discounted admission for children ages 6–12 on Saturday.

ticket_types.name: Sunday General Admission
ticket_types.description: Sunday general admission with access to all stages and vendor areas.

ticket_types.name: Sunday VIP Brunch Experience
ticket_types.description: Includes VIP brunch seating, welcome cocktail, and priority entry.

ticket_types.name: Sunday Child Ticket (Ages 6–12)
ticket_types.description: Discounted admission for children ages 6–12 on Sunday.

ticket_types.name: Sunday Senior Ticket (65+)
ticket_types.description: Reduced admission for guests age 65 and older on Sunday.

token_bundles.name: Snack Sampler - 10 Tokens
token_bundles.description: Perfect for light grazers who want to try a few bites.

token_bundles.name: Tasting Pack - 15 Tokens
token_bundles.description: Ideal for one hungry guest or two light eaters.

token_bundles.name: Value Pack - 16 Tokens
token_bundles.description: Extra value bundle that works well for a full afternoon of tastings.

token_bundles.name: Foodie Bundle - 20 Tokens
token_bundles.description: Great for sharing dishes between two food lovers.

token_bundles.name: Share & Save - 24 Tokens
token_bundles.description: Designed for small groups who want to sample widely.

token_bundles.name: Feast Pack - 30 Tokens
token_bundles.description: Enough tokens to keep a group of friends happily snacking all day.

token_bundles.name: Group Feast - 40 Tokens
token_bundles.description: Best value per token for larger groups and families.

token_pickup_options.name: Pick up at Main Entrance
token_pickup_options.location_description: Token booth directly inside the main festival gate.

token_pickup_options.name: Token Booth A - Center Plaza
token_pickup_options.location_description: Central token booth near the live music stage.

token_pickup_options.name: Mobile QR Code Pickup
token_pickup_options.location_description: Tokens are issued as a QR code scanned at any token booth.

token_pickup_options.name: VIP Lounge Token Desk
token_pickup_options.location_description: Exclusive pickup desk inside the VIP lounge area.

workshops.title: Baking Basics: Perfect Festival Cupcakes
workshops.description: Learn simple cupcake techniques, from batter mixing to smooth buttercream, ideal for home bakers.

workshops.title: Kids' Cupcake Decorating Lab
workshops.description: A fun, mess-friendly decorating session tailored to young bakers with sprinkles and colorful frosting.

workshops.title: Intro to Backyard Grilling
workshops.description: Master direct vs. indirect heat, grill safety, and simple marinades to upgrade your backyard cookouts.

workshops.title: Pastry Art: Elegant Tarts & Glazes
workshops.description: Advanced tart shell, custard, and glazing techniques for show-stopping desserts.

workshops.title: BBQ Low & Slow Masterclass
workshops.description: In-depth exploration of low-and-slow barbecue, including rubs, smoke management, and resting meats.

workshops.title: Artisan Sourdough at Home
workshops.description: Learn how to maintain a starter, mix, shape, and bake rustic sourdough loaves in a home oven.

workshops.title: Vegan Grilling: Veggies & Plant Proteins
workshops.description: Discover marinades and techniques to make vegetables and plant-based proteins shine on the grill.

workshops.title: Family Pizza Workshop
workshops.description: Make personal-sized pizzas as a family, from stretching dough to adding toppings.

workshops.title: Smoked Brisket Intensive
workshops.description: Deep dive into trimming, seasoning, smoking, and slicing competition-style brisket.

workshops.title: Sunday Brunch Skills: Eggs & More
workshops.description: Learn to poach, scramble, and bake eggs plus quick brunch sides.

workshops.title: Dessert Plating & Presentation
workshops.description: Tips and tricks to plate desserts like a restaurant, including sauces and garnishes.

workshops.title: Kids' No-Bake Treats
workshops.description: Child-friendly class making simple, no-bake snacks like energy bites and parfaits.

competition_registrations.dish_description: A creamy coconut-based panna cotta set with agar, topped with lime zest and macerated berries.
A rich dark chocolate tart with oat crust, layered with coconut milk caramel and sea salt flakes.
A hearty blend of black, kidney, and pinto beans with smoked paprika and fire-roasted tomatoes.
Slow-simmered chili with ground beef, pinto beans, and a secret chili powder blend.
Tender short ribs in a complex chili with espresso, cocoa, and smoked ancho chiles.
Lean turkey chili with roasted green chiles, tomatillos, and cilantro-lime crema.
Vanilla cupcakes with colorful sprinkles inside and whipped vanilla frosting on top.

competitions.name: Sunday Vegan Dessert Showdown
competitions.description: A plant-based dessert competition highlighting creative vegan sweets from home cooks and amateurs.
competitions.prize_description: $500 grand prize, $200 runner-up, and $100 crowd favorite.
competitions.rules: All entries must be 100% vegan (no animal products), prepared off-site in a licensed kitchen or home kitchen, and plated on-site. Contestants must provide an allergen list and arrive 45 minutes before start time.

competitions.name: Amateur Chili Cook-Off
competitions.description: A friendly chili cook-off for home cooks and amateurs, judged on flavor, aroma, and balance of heat.
competitions.prize_description: $400 grand prize and $200 people’s choice award.
competitions.rules: Open only to non-professional cooks. Chili must be cooked on-site from raw ingredients. No commercial chili bases. Contestants receive a shared tent space and power outlet.

competitions.name: Pro Division Chili Championship
competitions.description: A high-stakes chili championship for experienced competitors and restaurant teams.
competitions.prize_description: $1,000 grand prize, $300 second place, $200 best presentation.
competitions.rules: Open to restaurant teams, caterers, food truck crews, and seasoned competitors. Chili must be prepared on-site; meat must arrive chilled. Health and safety inspections are required before cooking begins.

competitions.name: Friday Open Chili Warm-Up
competitions.description: A casual warm-up chili contest welcoming all styles and heat levels.
competitions.rules: All chili styles welcome. Limited to one entry per team. Due to scheduling changes, final judging will be conducted by a condensed panel.

competitions.name: Kids' Cupcake Decorating Contest
competitions.description: Young bakers decorate pre-baked cupcakes with frosting and toppings in a timed challenge.
competitions.prize_description: Gift cards and baking kits for the top three decorators.
competitions.rules: Open to ages 8–14. Cupcakes are provided; contestants may bring one personal decorating tool. A parent or guardian must sign the waiver at check-in.

competitions.name: Smoked Pork Rib Throwdown
competitions.description: Pitmasters compete with their best racks of smoked pork ribs for juicy tenderness and flavor.
competitions.prize_description: $800 grand champion, $250 second place, $150 best sauce.
competitions.rules: Ribs must be cooked on wood or charcoal. No pre-boiling allowed. Teams must present a minimum of eight ribs for judging.

competitions.name: Open Dessert Plate Competition
competitions.description: A plated dessert competition for any sweet creation, from cakes to plated pastries.
competitions.prize_description: $600 grand prize and $300 best presentation award.
competitions.rules: Desserts may be prepared off-site but must be assembled and plated on-site. At least four portions must be presented to judges.

competitions.name: Vegetarian Entrée Challenge
competitions.description: Show off a satisfying vegetarian main dish that could star on any dinner table.
competitions.prize_description: $350 grand prize and $150 best use of seasonal produce.
competitions.rules: Dishes must be fully vegetarian (no meat, poultry, or fish). Eggs and dairy are allowed. Contestants should prepare at least four tasting portions.

competitions.name: Summer Sips Beverage Mix-Off
competitions.description: Create a signature non-alcoholic festival drink using fresh and seasonal ingredients.
competitions.rules: Only non-alcoholic beverages are allowed. Contestants must feature at least one fresh herb or fruit in their drink.

competitions.name: Street Taco Throwdown
competitions.description: Teams battle to create the ultimate street-style taco in a fast-paced challenge.
competitions.prize_description: $500 grand prize and $200 best salsa award.
competitions.rules: Each team must prepare at least 20 mini tacos for judges and tasters. Both corn and flour tortillas are permitted.

competitions.name: Vegan Burger Battle
competitions.description: Grill up the most delicious and inventive vegan burger patty and toppings.
competitions.prize_description: $450 grand prize and $200 best texture award.
competitions.rules: All components must be vegan, including buns and sauces. Patties may be prepared in advance but must be grilled on-site.

vendors.name: Green Garden Bowls
vendors.description: Build-your-own grain and salad bowls with vibrant seasonal vegetables, legumes, and house-made dressings.

vendors.name: Veggie Street Eats
vendors.description: Street food favorites made meat-free, including loaded fries, sliders, and skewers.

vendors.name: Herbivore Grill
vendors.description: Plant-powered burgers, grilled skewers, and charred veggies served hot off the grill.

vendors.name: Masala Vegan Kitchen
vendors.description: Spiced Indian comfort dishes remade with completely plant-based ingredients.

vendors.name: Crumb-Free Bakery
vendors.description: Dedicated gluten-free bakery serving cupcakes, cookies, and mini loaves.

vendors.name: Taco Time Cantina (GF)
vendors.description: Street tacos on certified gluten-free corn tortillas with a choice of fillings and salsas.

vendors.name: Fresh Bowls Express
vendors.description: Quick-serve grain bowls and wraps with plenty of gluten-free and vegetarian options.

vendors.name: Smoky Ridge BBQ
vendors.description: Slow-smoked brisket, pulled pork, and ribs with classic sides and signature sauces.

vendors.name: Sweet Spoons Ice Cream
vendors.description: Small-batch ice cream, sorbets, and kid-size sundaes with fun toppings.

vendors.name: Chili Corner Classic
vendors.description: Hearty beef and bean chili bowls, chili dogs, and loaded chili fries.
vendors.location: Competition Arena Food Court, Stand C2

vendors.name: Chili Corner Veggie
vendors.description: Vegetarian and vegan chilis packed with beans, vegetables, and bold spices.
vendors.location: Competition Arena Food Court, Stand C3

vendors.name: BBQ Boss Brisket Co.
vendors.description: Texas-style smoked brisket plates and sandwiches with classic fixings.

vendors.name: Mama Mia’s Wood-Fired Pizza
vendors.description: Neapolitan-style pizzas with classic and seasonal toppings, including a veggie special.

vendors.name: Northside Coffee Roasters
vendors.description: Specialty coffee drinks, cold brew, and bakery-style pastries.

vendors.name: Fiesta Tamales
vendors.description: Handmade tamales with pork, chicken, cheese, and veggie fillings, steamed in corn husks.

vendors.name: Rainbow Smoothie Bar
vendors.description: Colorful fruit and veggie smoothies, smoothie bowls, and fresh juices.

vendors.name: Garden Salad Shack
vendors.description: Crisp salads, grain bowls, and veggie-packed sides with customizable toppings.

vendors.name: Crispy Chicken Co.
vendors.description: Fried chicken sandwiches, tenders, and waffle fries with house sauces.

vendors.name: Tokyo Street Ramen
vendors.description: Bowls of ramen with rich broths, noodles, and toppings, plus a veggie miso option.

vendors.name: Mediterranean Mezze Bar
vendors.description: Build-your-own mezze plates with falafel, hummus, grilled veggies, and fresh pita.

menu_items.name: Classic Green Garden Bowl
menu_items.description: Brown rice, marinated chickpeas, roasted seasonal vegetables, baby greens, and lemon-tahini dressing.

menu_items.name: Mediterranean Power Bowl
menu_items.description: Quinoa, cucumber, tomato, olives, hummus, pickled onions, and herb vinaigrette.

menu_items.name: Crispy Chickpea Bites
menu_items.description: Smoky roasted chickpeas served with a side of lemon-tahini dip.

menu_items.name: Crispy Veggie Sliders
menu_items.description: Two mini brioche sliders with crispy veggie patties, pickles, and house sauce.

menu_items.name: Loaded Street Fries
menu_items.description: Crispy fries topped with melted cheese, scallions, and smoky chili mayo.

menu_items.name: Signature Herbivore Burger
menu_items.description: Grilled plant-based patty with caramelized onions, lettuce, tomato, and garlic aioli on a toasted bun.

menu_items.name: Charred Veggie Skewers
menu_items.description: Skewers of marinated zucchini, peppers, mushrooms, and onions, finished with herb oil.

menu_items.name: Masala Thali Plate
menu_items.description: Sampler plate with chana masala, aloo gobi, basmati rice, and cucumber salad.

menu_items.name: Spiced Potato Street Roll
menu_items.description: Curried potato filling wrapped in a paratha-style flatbread with chutney.

menu_items.name: Savory Veggie Quiche Slice (GF)
menu_items.description: Gluten-free crust filled with eggs, spinach, roasted peppers, and feta.

menu_items.name: Lemon Poppyseed Cupcake (GF)
menu_items.description: Moist gluten-free lemon cupcake with vanilla buttercream and poppyseeds.

menu_items.name: Gluten-Free Taco Trio
menu_items.description: Three corn-tortilla tacos with choice of chicken, pork, or veggies, topped with cilantro and onions.

menu_items.name: Kids' Mild Taco Plate
menu_items.description: One mild seasoned chicken taco with corn tortilla, rice, and beans.

menu_items.name: Classic Chicken Grain Bowl
menu_items.description: Grains, grilled chicken, mixed greens, roasted veggies, and yogurt herb sauce.

menu_items.name: Roasted Veggie Bowl
menu_items.description: Brown rice, roasted seasonal vegetables, pickled onions, and citrus vinaigrette.

menu_items.name: Tropical Smoothie Bowl
menu_items.description: Thick mango-pineapple smoothie base topped with granola, coconut flakes, and fresh fruit.

menu_items.name: Green Glow Juice
menu_items.description: Cold-pressed juice with kale, apple, cucumber, lemon, and ginger.

past_visits.notes: Tried two different bowls; fresh ingredients and fast service.
Brisket plate was tender with great bark; line was long but moved steadily.
Cupcakes were very moist for gluten-free; kids loved the flavors.
Taco trio with extra salsa; appreciated the clearly marked gluten-free options.
Kid-size sundaes were perfect; quick service near the family zone.
Thali plate had deep flavors and good heat; portions were generous.
Burger was hearty and satisfying; smoky flavor without being greasy.
Grabbed a quick smoothie between events; very fast line.
Classic beef chili with a good kick; chili fries were a bit salty but tasty.
Fresh salad bowl was a nice lighter option between heavier tastings.

reviews.comment: Super fresh bowls with great textures, and the line moved much faster than expected.
Tasty vegetarian street food; the sliders were filling and seasoned really well.
One of the best plant-based burgers I have had at any festival, smoky and satisfying.
Bold flavors with just the right amount of heat, and generous portions for the price.
Hard to believe these cupcakes are gluten-free; texture and flavor were both excellent.
Great gluten-free tacos with fresh toppings, and the mild option worked well for kids.
